projects.name: Faruk Resume Site
projects.description: Personal resume site with PDF export, Gmail API resume delivery, and semantic versioning.

projects.name: Financeiro
projects.description: Personal finance web app to import Nubank CSV statements, auto-categorize transactions with custom rules, review entries, and track monthly budgets.

projects.name: Job Hunter
projects.description: Searches MyGreenhouse for remote full-time jobs and filters geo-restricted listings so Brazil-based candidates see only eligible roles.

projects.name: Maco
projects.description: Full-stack cannabis grow manager: plant registry, 15-week ScheduleEngine for auto-generated phase tasks, dashboard, per-plant checklists, and fertilization calendar with per-user data isolation.
